to '2' (Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V' (Other Services claim). These capitated 
payment claims are captured in MMLEADS in the MDCD_OT_MC_CAPTD_SPEND variable. 

Note that the Center for Medicaid and CHIP Services (CMCS) at CMS has required redaction of the 
MDCD_PD_AMT field for managed care claims due to the proprietary and confidential nature of this
